{{CargoRelic
|name=Vortex Mask
|class_id=20094
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This mysterious ninja mask bears a distinctive vortex sign, which seems to exude some magical power that can hallucinate those who gaze upon it.
|fame=12
|art=12
|fth=20
|civ=34
|tech=12
|ss1=Per 50 Avatars activated, Snail RUSH +1<br>Avatars Activated: 1000/1000
|ss2=Per 50 Avatars activated, Snail RUSH +2<br>Avatars Activated: 1000/1000
|ss3=Per 50 Avatars activated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Avatars Activated: 1000/1000
|ss4=Per 50 Avatars activated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Avatars Activated: 1000/1000
|ss7=Per 50 Avatars activated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Avatars Activated: 1000/1000<br> (Awakened)
}}
